business_use: Remote administration of Linux and Unix systems
security_risk: Credential attacks tunneling and unauthorized remote access
suspicious_pattern: Repeated external login attempts or access from an unusual source IP
first_investigation_action: Check source IP destination host account login result and authorization

security_risk: Open relay abuse spam delivery phishing infrastructure and malware email activity
suspicious_pattern: Workstation sending a high volume of outbound email directly
first_investigation_action: Confirm whether the source is an approved mail server and review message volume and recipients

security_risk: DNS tunneling malicious domains resolver abuse and data exfiltration
suspicious_pattern: Long subdomains high query volume or unusual TXT requests
first_investigation_action: Review requesting host queried domains query types resolver and frequency

business_use: Unencrypted web traffic and legacy application access
security_risk: Credential exposure malicious downloads and unsafe redirects
suspicious_pattern: Sensitive data or executable downloads over cleartext HTTP
first_investigation_action: Review URL host request method response status and transferred object

security_risk: Encrypted command-and-control phishing and data exfiltration
suspicious_pattern: Regular beaconing unusual destinations or large outbound uploads
first_investigation_action: Review destination domain and IP process timing certificate and transfer volume

security_risk: Lateral movement ransomware credential relay and unauthorized share access
suspicious_pattern: One workstation connecting to many internal systems or shares
first_investigation_action: Review source host account accessed shares authentication results and destination count

security_risk: Brute force stolen credentials and unauthorized remote control
suspicious_pattern: External or after-hours RDP from an unusual user or source IP
first_investigation_action: Review logon events source IP MFA device ownership and authorization

security_risk: Remote execution lateral movement and administrative abuse
suspicious_pattern: WinRM traffic from an unapproved workstation or user
first_investigation_action: Identify initiating user process source host destination and change authorization

security_risk: Abuse of a privileged administration channel
suspicious_pattern: Privileged WinRM activity from an unexpected system or time
first_investigation_action: Verify authorization correlate logon and process events and review target systems
